svg.title: Retail Pricing & Market Intelligence Analytics Platform Architecture
svg.desc: End-to-end data pipeline from raw sources through Python ingestion, dbt transformation, to Power BI dashboards

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Microsoft sales dataset used in this project')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the currency exchange rate API used in this project')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the web scraping approach used for competitor prices')
sendPrompt('What does the Python ingestion script do for Excel files?')
sendPrompt('What does the Python ingestion script do for the currency API?')
sendPrompt('What does the Python web scraping script do?')
sendPrompt('What does the stg_sales model do in dbt?')
sendPrompt('What does the stg_currency_rates model do in dbt?')
sendPrompt('What does the stg_competitor_prices model do in dbt?')
sendPrompt('What data tests does dbt run in this project?')
sendPrompt('What does the fct_sales_with_currency mart contain?')
sendPrompt('What does the fct_profit_analysis mart contain?')
sendPrompt('What does the fct_price_comparison mart contain?')
sendPrompt('What does the fct_currency_impact mart contain?')
sendPrompt('What Power BI dashboards should I build for this project?')
g.text: Sales · Profit · Pricing intelligence · Currency impact dashboards
